description_long: This is a modern, upholstered chaise with a gently curved backrest and armrests that seamlessly blend into the overall form. The seat is wide and deep, featuring a single, thick cushion with subtle tufting for added texture and comfort. The backrest is moderately high and also tufted, providing both support and a touch of elegance. The chaise stands on four slender, straight legs made of dark metal, giving it a contemporary and slightly elevated appearance. The upholstery is a smooth, solid gray fabric, contributing to a minimalist and versatile aesthetic suitable for urban environments. The overall silhouette is soft and inviting, with rounded edges and a cohesive, monolithic design.
description: A modern gray upholstered chaise with a tufted seat and backrest, curved armrests, and slim dark metal legs. Its soft, rounded form and minimalist style make it suitable for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tufted seat and backrest, curved armrests, and the full width of the chaise.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the gentle curve of the backrest and the depth of the seat, with one armrest visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, continuous backrest and both armrests curving forward.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the chaise's depth and the curvature of the backrest and armrest.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is moderately high, gently curved, and features a series of subtle tufted buttons for visual interest. It wraps smoothly into the armrests, creating a continuous, enveloping form.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, integrated into the curved backrest and rising to a medium height.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, slender, and made of dark metal, positioned at each corner for stability and a modern look. They have a simple, unadorned finish.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid gray fabric with a tufted pattern on both the seat and backrest, adding texture without any additional decorative patterns.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, thick seat cushion that is attached and spans the full width of the chaise, with the backrest and armrests seamlessly upholstered for a unified appearance.
